package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationCopySliceBeforeReadonlyRange() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_copy_slice_before_readonly_range"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag slice copies made immediately before read-only range loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
